settings.title: Pre Sale Questions
settings.question_1: Q: “Will your template be fully compatible with Shopify?”
settings.question_2: Q: “What is included in the theme package?”
settings.answer_2:
Please make sure that you follow below steps:

1/ Download the package from themeforest.net (The file is in zip format)

2/ Extract the file you've just downloaded (Don't forget this step).

3/ Find this file: ella-x.x.x-sections-ready.zip in the folder Ella Sections Ready x.x.x, then you just need to upload ella-x.x.x-sections-ready.zip file to your Shopify store.

- If you would like to use Ella RTL version. Please find this file: ella-x.x.x-sections-ready-rtl.zip in the folder Ella Sections Ready x.x.x RTL, then you just need to upload ella-x.x.x-sections-ready-rtl.zip file to your Shopify store

- If you want to install child theme, please go to the corresponding theme folder
settings.question_3: Q: “Do you guys offer a refund or exchange?”
settings.answer_3:
To save your time and reach our support quickly, please follow below steps:

  • Create a staff account for us (with Themes permission and Settings permission) http://docs.shopify.com/manual/settings/account/staff-members
  • Capture screenshot or video for the issue you get.
  • Specify which template and version you are using.
  • Describe clearly how to reproduce the issue.
  • Send all information (staff account, screenshot, video, template name and version, description of the issues, link) to email@domain.com
settings.question_4: Q: “Would assistance be available to upload the template if needed?”
settings.answer_4: Yes, we will assist you to install the template if needed
settings.question_5: Q: “Do you guys offer customisation services for your themes?”
settings.answer_5: Yes, we do. Please send your customisation requests to email@domain.com, we will give you our quote. Thank you.
settings.question_6: Q: “Do you guys provide customer support during weekends/holidays?”
settings.answer_6: Normally we don't provide support during weekends, except for urgent cases. In these cases, you only need to mark “Urgent” in your email, we will get back to you ASAP.
settings.question_7: Q: “What I have to do when I need your support?”
settings.answer_7:
1/ Create a staff account for us (with Themes permission and Settings permission) http://docs.shopify.com/manual/settings/account/staff-members

2/ Capture screenshot or video for the issue you get.

3/ Specify which template and version you are using.

4/ Describe clearly how to reproduce the issue.

5/ Submit a support ticket at here: https://halosoft.ticksy.com/. Our support team will get back to you soonest, please help us to wait.

settings.faqs_text:
Below FAQ are some common concerns of our clients before purchasing the theme.
If you have other questions, please just send it to example@domain.com.
settings.faqs_message_text:
If you have an issue or question that requires immediate assistance, you can click the button below to chat live with a Customer Service representative.

If we aren’t available, drop us an email and we will get back to you within 20-36 hours!

settings.question: How do I ensure this part fits my vehicle?
settings.answer: Use the Add Vehicle tool at the top of the website and enter your Year, Make, and Model. This helps display parts intended for your vehicle. If you are unsure, contact our support team before ordering.

settings.question: Are your parts new or refurbished?
settings.answer: Unless otherwise stated, all parts sold on Car Part Global are brand-new. Product condition details, if applicable, are always listed on the product page.

settings.question: What does “OEM” and “Aftermarket” mean?
settings.answer:
OEM (Original Equipment Manufacturer) parts meet original factory specifications.
Aftermarket parts are produced by trusted manufacturers and often offer comparable performance at competitive prices.

settings.question: Can I install this part myself?
settings.answer: Installation requirements vary by product. Some parts are suitable for DIY installation, while others may require professional installation. Always review product details before installing.

settings.question: When will my order ship?
settings.answer: Orders are typically processed within 1–2 business days, depending on product availability. Shipping timelines vary based on destination and carrier.

settings.question: Will I receive tracking information?
settings.answer: Yes. Once your order ships, you will receive a tracking number by email so you can monitor your delivery.

settings.question: Do you ship internationally?
settings.answer: Yes, international shipping is available to Canada Only right now. Shipping costs and delivery timelines are calculated at checkout.

settings.question: Can I change my shipping address after placing an order?
settings.answer: Address changes may be possible if the order has not yet shipped. Please contact customer support as soon as possible after placing your order.

settings.question: What is your return policy?
settings.answer: Returns are accepted according to our Return & Refund Policy. Items must be unused, uninstalled, and returned in original packaging with an approved RMA.

settings.question: How do I start a return?
settings.answer: To request a return, email info@carpartglobal.com with your order number and item details. Our team will guide you through the process.

settings.question: Can I return an installed part?
settings.answer: Installed or modified parts are generally not eligible for return, unless otherwise approved under warranty or defect guidelines.

settings.question: Do your parts come with a warranty?
settings.answer: Most products are covered by a manufacturer’s warranty, where applicable. Warranty terms vary by brand and product type.

settings.question: What should I do if my part arrives damaged or defective?
settings.answer: If your order arrives damaged or defective, contact our support team immediately with photos and your order number so we can assist you.

settings.question: How can I contact Customer Support?
settings.answer:
You can reach us through:
Email: info@carpartglobal.com
Phone: +1 214 910 0205

settings.text: If you don’t see your question here, visit our Contact Us page or reach out to our support team — we’re happy to help.
